notice: This records technical provenance leads and content identities. It does not grant rights or constitute legal advice. No dataset license in this file has been verified by this repository.

policy.raw_downloads: Keep raw third-party datasets outside Git until their terms and redistribution rights are reviewed.
policy.derived_artifacts: Commit a derived artifact only after recording its exact inputs, transformation, checksum, license obligations, and allowed redistribution.
policy.splits: Split train, validation, and test data by composition or recording, never by chord window from the same work.
policy.audio: Do not redistribute referenced audio unless explicit permission has been verified.

current_artifacts.upstream_locator_status: not recorded in the local repository

current_artifacts.preprocessing: run-length encode held beat tokens, count chord-change contexts, back off from order 4 to order 1

candidate_sources.name: Music Technology Group software and datasets catalog
ChoCo: the Chord Corpus
candidate_sources.intended_use: standardized chord, key, style, and modulation training data
candidate_sources.license_status: not verified; review every partition and its redistribution terms

candidate_sources.name: DCML corpora
candidate_sources.intended_use: Roman-numeral function, cadence, tonicization, and modulation supervision
candidate_sources.license_status: not verified; review each included corpus

candidate_sources.name: Audio-aligned Jazz Harmony
candidate_sources.intended_use: jazz phrase structure, chord extensions, harmonic rhythm, and evaluation
candidate_sources.license_status: not verified; annotations and referenced audio may have different terms

candidate_sources.name: Haydn Op. 20 harmonic annotations
candidate_sources.intended_use: classical functional harmony, inversions, cadences, and modulation evaluation
